title: The Oblivion Sanctum
description: A vanilla+ modpack with an "everything" kind of feel, including a dark twist.
body:
Delve into a reimagined Minecraft, built using over 200 mods to deliver a vanilla+ feel. However, don't be fooled. Something dark is hiding around every corner.

Whether it be the camera mechanics, fishing, combat, structures, biomes, everything has been tweaked to provide a more optimal version of the game. This is what Minecraft could be.
